python-bidi
===========

# Available modules


The overview below shows which python-bidi installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using python-bidi, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load python-bidi/0.6.0-GCCcore-12.3.0
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
